x1dg@portfolio:~/about
x1dg@portfolio:~/about$ whoami
Даниил Черданцев — Senior .NET Backend Developer из Екатеринбурга
7+ лет опыта в FinTech, Insurance и GameDev
Специализируюсь на высоконагруженных микросервисных системах

→ .NET 6/8 & ASP.NET Core
→ C# & SQL
→ PostgreSQL / MSSQL / MySQL
→ Apache Kafka & RabbitMQ
→ Redis & Entity Framework Core

x1dg@portfolio:~/about$ cat ./background.txt
Tech Lead @ Smokescope (Fintech, US stock market)
Previously: Astrum Entertainment (Warface, 20k CCU)
Previously: Сравни.ру (Insurance, 15+ integrations)
Previously: КНОПКА & ХОСТ
UrFU — Computer Science, 2020
English: B2
x1dg@portfolio:~/experience
x1dg@portfolio:~/experience$ ls -la
drwxr-xr-x
smokescope/ [2026 — 2026, 5 months]
Tech Lead — Anomaly detection platform for US stock market. .NET 8, Kafka, PostgreSQL, Redis, SignalR, Docker, K8s.
→ Event-driven architecture, SAGA + Outbox, 6x faster releases (2h → 20min), incident detection 15min → 3min
drwxr-xr-x
astrum-entertainment/ [2025 — 2026, 1 year]
.NET Developer — Warface (online shooter, 20k CCU). .NET 5/8, C++, CryENGINE 3, MySQL, RabbitMQ.
→ API -30% latency, weapon stickers system (99.5% success), matchmaking 45s → 25s, fixed 12 memory leaks (-2.5GB RAM)
drwxr-xr-x
sravni.ru/ [2021 — 2024, 3 years]
.NET Developer — Insurance platform (OSAGO), 15+ integrations via REST/SOAP. .NET 6/8, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, K8s.
→ Monolith → microservices, CQRS, MSSQL → PostgreSQL (300GB zero downtime), SQL 4s → 450ms, RAM -25% (~300k RUB/mo saved), .NET 3.1→6→8 migration
drwxr-xr-x
knopka.com/ [2020 — 2021, 10 months]
.NET Developer — Corporate portal (Slack-like). .NET Core 3.1, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, Redis, SignalR, Docker, React.
→ Real-time presence (SignalR/Redis), ML.NET + Python FastAPI, CI/CD in Jenkins, jQuery → React+TypeScript
drwxr-xr-x
hostco.ru/ [2018 — 2020, 2 years]
.NET Programmer — Medical Information System (MIS). .NET Framework 4.x, MSSQL, React, TypeScript, SOAP, TeamCity.
→ Reporting 20-30s → 1-2s (15-20x), appointment booking with OMS/DMS/SMS, jQuery → React migration
